iteration3.notes: All bun-tests pass, summary-quality LLM judge 0.5/1.0

iteration1.notes: Timeout - model asked question about which library to use

iteration2.notes: Passed after directive skill telling model to use reportlab

changes: Replaced verbose multi-file skill (SKILL.md + forms.md + reference.md + scripts/) with single concise SKILL.md
Added prominent warning that PDF files are binary and cannot be read with text tools
Made library choices directive: pdfplumber for extraction, reportlab for creation, pypdf for merge/split
Added explicit instruction to never ask user which library to use
Removed forms.md, reference.md, scripts/ directory, LICENSE.txt as unreferenced by final skill
Reduced skill from ~600+ lines across multiple files to ~80 lines in single file
